accountSettings.deleteAlert: Are you sure you want to delete this account?
accountSettings.deleteSubtitle: This will remove your account and all transaction history.

iframeContent.error: There is an error with the content, please, try again

restartAlert.subtitleLabel: If you restart, you'll lose all the data you've already filled and will return to the beginning of the process.

leaveAlert.subtitle: If you leave this view, the form will reset and all of your data will be removed from the form. Are you sure?
leaveAlert.title: Exit and reset form?

createWalletStep1.body_1: This set of secret words make it easy to back up and restore your account. This makes your wallet really secure
createWalletStep1.body_2: It’s really important you remember your phrase correctly so we will help you with that. If you’re in a rush you can do it another time.
createWalletStep1.body_3: Give your wallet a memorable name and you're ready to go!
createWalletStep1.title: Create Wallet

createWalletStep2.body_1: Below you will find your secret phrase
createWalletStep2.body_2: Write this phrase down on a piece of paper or record it in a secure digital note. You can also download it above but be sure to keep it safe.
createWalletStep2.body_3: Anyone with this phrase will be able to steal your hard earned assets and you won’t be able to get them back!
createWalletStep2.dialog_body: In order to keep your security phrase safe make sure it’s saved in an encrypted note.
createWalletStep2.dialog_title: Make sure you keep your security phrase safe
createWalletStep2.title: Create Wallet

createWalletStep3.body_1: Please select each phrase in the correct order to make sure you’ve got it right.
createWalletStep3.dialog_1_body: Confirming that you have correctly backed up your security phrase is highly recommended
createWalletStep3.dialog_1_title: Are you sure you want to skip back up confirmation?
createWalletStep3.dialog_2_body: Please try again to confirm your back up
createWalletStep3.title: Create Wallet

createWalletStep4.body_1: Give your wallet a memorable name, maybe it could be related to what you want to use the wallet for like “trading” or “investments”.

errors.name: Must be at least 1 character and less than 21 characters

createWalletStep4.title: Create Wallet

createWalletStep5.subtitle: Select the desired blockchain for your new account
createWalletStep5.title: Create Wallet

createWalletStep6.body_1: Remember to keep your secret phrase safe, having several backups is always a good idea.
createWalletStep6.body_2: If you need to find out a wallets secret phrase you can find it in the settings page for that wallet.
createWalletStep6.label_1: Congratulations, You’re the proud owner of a shiny new wallet!
createWalletStep6.title: Create Wallet

feature1.header: The original wallet on the move
feature1.subtitle: All the best features of our desktop wallet plus more in the palm of your hand

feature2.subtitle: Neon Wallet has been designed to make managing your crypto assets as intuitive as possible

feature3.subtitle: The BIP39 standard allows you to create infinite child accounts using a single mnemonic

feature4.subtitle: The team is working around the clock to bring you the latest features

withAccountsToBackup.description_1: A requirement of securing your wallet through password or biometric authentication is to first back up your wallets.
withAccountsToBackup.description_2: This is a precautionary step to prevent you from losing your password or otherwise not be able to authenticate and losing access to all your funds.
withAccountsToBackup.description_3: Please back up the following wallets
withAccountsToBackup.description_4: If you have multiple wallets you will be brought back here after each back up to back up the next wallet.

withoutAccountsToBackup.description: All wallets are backed up, please continue to setup security
